  bounded : ∀ x, |K x| ≤ C
  /-- Non-negativity: K(x) ≥ 0 for all x (probability kernel)-/
  nonneg : ∀ x, 0 ≤ K x
  /-- Symmetry: K(-x) = K(x) -/
  symmetric : ∀ x, K (-x.1, -x.2) = K x
